verified_task_success.caveat: Built-in scenarios are a rerunnable smoke signal, not a large benchmark.

false_completion_claims.evidence_source: model process exit code 0 compared with per-workspace python3 -m unittest exit code
false_completion_claims.caveat: Completion claims are bounded to model process exit code 0; output text is retained for audit but not tone-scored.

profile_overhead.evidence_source: measured model process duration_seconds from local harness subprocess runs
profile_overhead.caveat: Durations are descriptive local subprocess measurements only; this smoke sample supports no categorical speed winner.

local_model_benefit.evidence_source: scenario local-model role metadata plus per-workspace python3 -m unittest exit code

scenarios.title: Whitespace word counter bug fix
scenarios.local_model_fit_reason: small deterministic Python function with local tests and limited context

local_model_benefit.caveat: This identifies local-model candidate task categories and observed harness outcomes; provider-specific benefit requires rerunning with a local-model-backed command or provider check.

fanout_value.evidence_source: scenario fanout-fit metadata plus per-workspace python3 -m unittest exit code

policy.decision_rule: Use fanout when two or more self-contained code, docs, or adapter surfaces can be inspected without waiting on each other.
policy.value_signal: distinct worker material can be merged, then checked by one orchestrator-run verifier
policy.cost_signal: each task is a fresh worker call, so keep context narrow and task prompts independent
policy.verification_boundary: worker output is material until the orchestrator merges it and runs verify_run or outcome_check

policy.decision_rule: Use fanout when independent sources, host adapters, or benchmark variants can be compared side by side.
policy.value_signal: parallel reads reduce wall-clock time and make disagreement visible before implementation
policy.cost_signal: each source or variant spends separate quota or local compute
policy.verification_boundary: claims still need source links, command evidence, or a merged executable check

policy.decision_rule: Avoid fanout for one small implementation surface with one direct verifier.
policy.value_signal: a single worker can make the edit and run the verifier
policy.cost_signal: extra workers duplicate prompt context and consume quota without independent outputs
policy.verification_boundary: run the local verifier once after the focused edit

policy.decision_rule: Avoid fanout when each step depends on the previous step's concrete output.
policy.value_signal: sequential host work preserves ordering and reduces merge confusion
policy.cost_signal: parallel workers would speculate, then require reconciliation work
policy.verification_boundary: advance one step at a time and verify each completion claim

scenarios.title: Whitespace word counter bug fix
scenarios.fanout_fit_reason: single focused bug fix with one tiny implementation surface and one local verifier
scenarios.fresh_worker_call_cost: fanout would run one fresh worker per task; this harness records fit but does not estimate tokens, dollars, or local compute

fanout_value.caveat: This reports fanout fit and single-worker sufficiency for built-in smoke scenarios; proving fanout value requires independent worker outputs, a merged artifact, and a verifier run after the merge.

role_strength.evidence_source: Mythify model_policy role contracts plus local eval verifier outcomes

roles.evidence_boundary: Mythify may recommend a host model but the host applies or confirms the current chat model.
roles.harness_evidence: host session model not controlled by local eval

roles.evidence_boundary: Triage is advisory material and stays cheap unless explicitly configured outside this harness.
roles.harness_evidence: local_model_benefit marks candidate task categories for this role

roles.evidence_boundary: Reader output is material, not verification evidence.
roles.harness_evidence: local_model_benefit marks candidate task categories for this role

roles.evidence_boundary: Worker output is material and must be merged, then verified by commands.
roles.harness_evidence: local eval runs one worker path, not fanout isolation

roles.evidence_boundary: Only reviewer tasks get the scoped stronger-model opt-in without broad worker escalation.
Verifier evidence comes from executable commands and exit codes, not model strength.

role_strength.caveat: This reports role policy and local harness outcomes; proving that a stronger model improves a role requires a paired run with that role isolated.

caveats: This is a small local paired comparison, not a statistically powered benchmark.
This artifact contains 2 completed pairs; timing is descriptive only and supports no speed winner.
Pair order is fixed bare then Mythify, so order effects are not controlled.
Model service load, CLI versions, model aliases, and account settings can affect results.
Task success is decided by the external verifier exit code, not model prose.
Full local reports can contain temporary paths and output tails and must not be committed.
